name: HWM_TM_REPROCESS_REQUEST
description: Table for storing the reprocessing data like Status,Source and Reason for time record groups .

columns.Name: TM_REPROCESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Refers to TM_REC_GRP_ID in TM_REC_GRP

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: Refers to TM_REC_GRP_VERSION in TM_REC_GRP

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The resource for which the time record group applies.

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_STATUS
columns.Comments: TM_REC_GRP_STATUS

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: START_TIME

columns.Name: AUTO_APPROVE
columns.Comments: Contains a (Y/N) value to specify if elegible for Auto Approval

columns.Name: REPROCESS_REASON
columns.Comments: REPROCESS_REASON

columns.Name: REQUIRES_MANUAL_PROCESSING
columns.Comments: Contains a (Y/N) value to specify if it requires manual processing.

columns.Name: REPROCESS_REQUEST_TIME
columns.Comments: The time at which a request has been submitted for re-processing.

columns.Name: REPROCESS_SOURCE
columns.Comments: The source Event/Ess Jod which has triggered request for re-processing

columns.Name: REPROCESS_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id for the Event/Ess Job which has triggered request for re-processing

columns.Name: REPROCESS_REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the request that has been submitted for reprocess

columns.Name: REPROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the Time RecordGroup (row)  that has been submitted for reprocess.

columns.Name: RUN_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time for reprocessing run for the row

columns.Name: RUN_END_TIME
columns.Comments: End time for reprocessing run for the row

columns.Name: RUN_ERROR
columns.Comments: Stores error if any that is encountered during reprocessing.

columns.Name: LATEST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if this is the latest entry of the time record group (there will be a unique combination of TM_REC_GRP_ID and LATEST_FLAG).

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: TM_REC_GRP_ID, TM_REC_GRP_VERSION, LATEST_FLAG, REPROCESS_SOURCE_ID, REPROCESS_STATUS, REPROCESS_REASON
